formulaNotes: Per preview level L (1..maxMonsterLevel): resolve armorPts/magicArmorPts at level L for each enemy unit template; summaryByMonsterLevel[L] stores the median of those values among units whose spawnLevelSpan contains L (templates that cannot spawn at L are excluded from that level’s median). foePower uses merged FoePower: two-point levelScaling with runtime geometric curve v0*((v1/v0)^(1/(EarlyMaxLevel-1)))^(L-1) (see getAtbLevelScaling@19714), multiplier and levelMultiplier breakpoints. armorPts / magicArmorPts use getResistanceLevelScaling@19713: r*(a+b*L)/(1-r) from ResistanceScalableReductionFormula (a,b) with r = specScaling.armorReduction or magicReduction on the merged Armor / MagicArmor stat row, then stat multiplier, stat levelMultiplier breakpoints, and math_round (see Unit.getAtbLevelScaling@5422). Per-stat scaling[] operators and affix layers are not included. Templates without FoePower still get armor if their merged Armor/MagicArmor row defines a valid reduction.

units.name: Nepsid Whale of the Lost City
